image:image.image:title: RangerEye Autonomous Wildfire Detection Drone System
image:image.image:caption: RangerEye autonomous drone over forest with thermal wildfire detection — Florida Institute of Technology senior design project

image:image.image:title: RangerEye CAD Render — Hybrid VTOL Drone Design
image:image.image:caption: CAD render of RangerEye hybrid fixed-wing VTOL autonomous drone for wildfire detection

image:image.image:title: RangerEye Drone — Autonomous Wildfire Detection Research
image:image.image:caption: RangerEye hybrid VTOL drone developed as part of Florida Institute of Technology senior design capstone 2023-2025

image:image.image:title: RangerEye Working Prototype — Field Ready Autonomous Drone
image:image.image:caption: RangerEye working prototype during field testing for autonomous wildfire detection

image:image.image:title: RangerEye CAD Render — Technical Specifications
image:image.image:caption: CAD render showing RangerEye 6.5kg hybrid VTOL drone with 1.6m wingspan and thermal imaging payload

image:image.image:title: RangerEye Team at Melbourne Fire Station — Florida Tech Senior Design
image:image.image:caption: The RangerEye engineering team at Melbourne Fire Station — Florida Institute of Technology senior design capstone 2023-2025

image:image.image:title: Onat Cakici — RangerEye Project Manager and Manufacturing Lead
image:image.image:caption: Onat D. Cakici, Project Manager and Manufacturing Lead, RangerEye autonomous wildfire detection — Florida Institute of Technology

image:image.image:caption: John Munday, Hardware Engineer, RangerEye autonomous wildfire detection drone — Florida Institute of Technology

image:image.image:caption: Mitchell Lacle, Systems Engineer, RangerEye autonomous wildfire detection — Florida Institute of Technology
